title: Pretty Optimized
description: A collection of optimizations, graphical and QoL mods with default configurations for the best Minecraft plug and play! Built off Fabulously Optimized.
body:
# Pretty Optimized 🌺
[![Built on Fabulously Optimized](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/compact/built-with/fabulously-optimized_46h.png)](https://download.fo)

This pack is meant to strike the middle ground in terms of Optimization, graphical fidelity and quality of life, letting you play with smooth frames and better looking world all at the same time. Built off of Fabulously Optimized this mod includes resource packs, shaders and extra mods to add extra visuals and features to Minecraft!

## Additions ➕
This pack includes mods such as Distant Horizon, The Visuality Mod, The Ambient Sounds Mods and more to improve visual fidelity & immersion while providing an optimized experience.

Mods such as Xaero's Minimap & Worldmap and Pick up Notifier are added for more featureful HUD by default.

Bloop Shaders, BSL Shaders, and Complementary Shaders are included and work with Distant Horizons!

This modpack also includes resource packs enabled by default to add some varitey to your world such as multiple block variations and extra animations! 

## Vanilla Tweaks 🔧
This modpack includes Vanilla Tweaks which can be found [here](https://vanillatweaks.net/). The enabled tweaks can be found below.
```
Lower Fire
Lower Shield
No Cave Sounds
Variated Villagers
Randomly Rotated Sunflowers
Variated Carved Pumpkins
Variated Bookshelves
Variated Unpolished Stones
Variated Terracotta
Variated Stone
Variated Planks
Variated Mycelium
Variated Gravel
Variated End Stone
Variated Nylium
Variated Red Mushroom Blocks
Variated Birch Logs
Variated Bricks
Variated Moss
Variated Cobblestone
Variated Grass
Variated Coarse Dirt
Variated Dirt
Directional Dispensers & Droppers
Directional Observers
Directional Hoppers
```

## Issues & Suggestions⚠️
Major performance issues as well as mod suggestions can be submitted using the sidebar links!

## LighterWise Pack 🏳️‍🌈
This project is also a derivative of [LighterWise Pack](https://modrinth.com/project/t06gpLHc) with the majority of the mods & without the branding!
